summary: Tool registration properly wired into ConversationEngine with shared tool_executor module; fixed missing services passthrough in simulation orchestrator/phases

findings.description: SimulationOrchestrator and PhaseRunner did not pass 'services' to ConversationEngine, meaning tools were unavailable during run_simulation.py simulations — only watch_conversations.py and test_agent.py had tools wired
run_simulation.py did not pass services=svc when constructing SimulationOrchestrator
